{{Quote|You have forgotten the first rule of survival in an autocracy—speak truth to power. I hope the pain will help you learn from your mistake.|Captain Gegak|<ref name="Tyrant's Test">''[[Tyrant's Test]]''</ref>}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Gegak''' was the commanding officer of the ''[[Tobay]]'', an [[Adz-class patrol destroyer|''Adz''-class patrol destroyer]] serving with the [[Grand Imperial Navy]], the defensive fleet of the [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress world]] of [[Prakith/Legends|Prakith]] in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]].

==Biography==
Captain Gegak was inclined to grandiloquent words, and prone to fits of rage. He harbored a paranoid resentment towards Captain [[Voba Dokrett]] of the cruiser ''[[Gorath]]'', a larger, newer and faster ship which he saw as eclipsing his own command's success. He also carried a [[neural whip]] inside his tunic, which he used to impress his opinions on his subordinates. Nevertheless, Gegak's bullying bluster seems to have coexisted with a basic awareness of the realities of power within in the Prakith navy.

Unlike Captain Dokrett and the ''Gorath'', Gegak and his ship survived the Prakith navy's encounter with the ''[[Teljkon Vagabond]]'' in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]]—perhaps ironically, because the destroyer's ill-maintained sensors could not track the alien ship effectively. However, it is not known what became of Gegak or his ship when the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] conquered Prakith a few years later.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
